intent: To provide a centralized platform for creating, managing, and delivering educational content to facilitate structured learning and performance tracking.

entities.name: User Management Module
entities.description: Handles authentication, authorization, and role-based access control for admins, instructors, and students.

entities.name: Content Management System
entities.description: Provides interfaces for uploading, organizing, and managing multimedia learning materials including videos, documents, and interactive quizzes.

entities.name: Learning Path Engine
entities.description: Structures content into courses or modules to guide students through a logical progression of learning materials.

entities.name: Analytics and Reporting Engine
entities.description: Tracks student engagement, quiz performance, and course completion metrics to generate actionable insights.

entities.name: Integration Gateway
entities.description: Facilitates seamless connectivity with external authentication providers and third-party tools via APIs.

architecture.description: The system architecture follows a modular service-oriented design where admins and instructors utilize the Content Management System to curate learning materials, which are then assigned to students via the Learning Path Engine. User identities are managed through the User Management Module, leveraging the Integration Gateway for SSO and external services. Students interact with the multimedia content, and their activity data is captured in real-time, processed by the Analytics Engine, and surfaced as progress reports for both students and instructors.

endpoints.summary: Authenticate user and return access token
Retrieve profile information for a specific user
Upload and assign content to a course
Fetch student progress metrics for a course

rules.description: Ensure that user roles are assigned before granting access to specific module features to prevent unauthorized content manipulation.
rules.logic: IF user.role IS NULL OR user.role == 'Unassigned' THEN deny access TO 'Content Management System' AND 'Learning Path Engine'.

rules.description: Maintain data integrity by preventing the deletion of learning content that is currently associated with an active Learning Path.
rules.logic: IF content.status == 'Active' AND content.is_linked_to_path == true THEN block deletion AND return error 'Cannot delete content linked to active learning paths'.

rules.description: Ensure progress data is consistent by validating that all mandatory module components are completed before updating the overall course completion status to 100%.
rules.logic: IF student.completed_components < total_required_components THEN course.completion_status = 'In Progress' ELSE course.completion_status = 'Completed'.

rules.description: Maintain authentication security by validating external tokens received through the Integration Gateway against identity provider standards before session creation.
rules.logic: IF external_token.is_valid == false OR external_token.expired == true THEN terminate_session AND redirect_to 'Login'.

rules.description: Enforce logical sequencing in the Learning Path Engine by preventing students from accessing advanced modules until prerequisite modules are marked as completed.
rules.logic: IF student.requested_module.prerequisite_id NOT IN student.completed_modules THEN restrict access AND display 'Prerequisite required'.
